scope: Source-backed baseline for supported LAL CLI entrypoints. It records configured and static destinations, not an observation of live network traffic.

entries.reachability: GatewayClient resolves one origin and sends its LAL route requests to it.
entries.authorization: Bearer device token is sent when configured; LAL route handlers are documented in the client source.

entries.destination: configured LAL host from LAL_HOST or ~/.lal/client-host
entries.reachability: The distribution wrappers post a best-effort heartbeat before invoking the installed runtime.
entries.authorization: Authorization bearer token and device headers are constructed from local LAL state.

entries.destination: configured LAL host from LAL_HOST or ~/.lal/client-host
entries.reachability: Only the explicit update command fetches the LAL-hosted installer.
entries.authorization: The shell wrapper passes LAL_TOKEN; the command wrapper reads the local pairing token before invoking the LAL-hosted installer.

entrypoints: native interactive terminal when usage statistics are enabled
entries.reachability: QwenLogger only exists when Config usage statistics are enabled. The CLI settings-to-config default is false, but a settings value can enable it.
entries.authorization: none; this is not an approved LAL destination
entries.acceptance_status: must be blocked by the future harness and removed or made unenableable

entrypoints: native interactive terminal outside the LAL managed wrapper
entries.destination: npm registry selected by update-notifier; no fixed host is declared in this source
entries.reachability: The post-render update task requires LAL_MANAGED not equal to 1 and settings.general.enableAutoUpdate true. The package bin sets LAL_MANAGED to 1 before loading the CLI.
entries.authorization: none; this is not an approved LAL destination
entries.acceptance_status: must be blocked by the future harness and removed or made unreachable

entrypoints: native terminal with telemetry enabled and an OTLP endpoint configured
entries.destination: operator-provided telemetry.otlpEndpoint or OTEL/QWEN_TELEMETRY endpoint environment variable
entries.reachability: Telemetry is disabled unless enabled by argv, environment, or settings; endpoint resolution accepts explicit operator configuration.
entries.acceptance_status: requires exporter and sensitive-field review before retention
